<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping

AJP custom-to-root-context combined with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*; PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy and /app/ui/HILLA is rewritten back to /HILLA. The AJP catch-all carries the rest, including /app/ui/connect/* and root-level static resources.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
RewriteEngine on
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Upgrade}    websocket [NC]
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Connection} upgrade [NC]
# WebSocket frames are not carried over AJP, so PUSH connections are proxied
# directly to Vaadin's HTTP port. The /app public prefix is stripped, and
# Hilla push collapses /ui/HILLA back to /HILLA while Vaadin push (and any
# other in-mapping WS upgrade) keeps the /ui mapping.
# /app/ui/HILLA/push  -> /HILLA/push
# /app/ui/VAADIN/push -> /ui/VAADIN/push
# $2 = 'HILLA' if path matches /app/ui/HILLA/*, otherwise blank
# $3 = 'ui' if path does not match /app/ui/HILLA/*, otherwise blank
RewriteRule ^/app/(ui/(HILLA)|(ui))/(.*) "ws://vaadin:8080/$2$3/$4" [P,L]

ProxyPass         /app/ui/HILLA/    ajp://vaadin:8009/HILLA/
ProxyPass         /app/             ajp://vaadin:8009/
ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/" "/app"
```
